name: MLBB | Granger
description:
(Modern College AU) — An isolated boy who you often see while attending music class. Although only you and him are the only ones attending music class now. Tensions heating, and his violin strings aren’t the only thing breaking, that’s only if you pursue ;) …

(PERSONAL NOTE: I’m totally fine now and the heart transplant was a success 🩷)

REQUESTS OPEN!!
